---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Title** *(one sentence)*
> e.g. "Allow bulk-exporting reports as CSV from the dashboard"

**Category**
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ⚡ Improvement to existing feature
- [ ] 🔗 Integration
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility
- [ ] ⚙️ Performance
- [ ] 🔒 Security

---

### Problem & motivation *(required)*
*What problem are you running into? Who is affected and how often?*

> Tip: be specific — "it's slow" is less useful than "loading takes 8s on a standard connection."

**Frequency:** Daily / Weekly / Monthly / Occasionally

---

### Proposed solution *(required)*
*Describe what you'd like to happen. Focus on the outcome — the team may find a better implementation.*

**Priority to you:**
- [ ] 🔴 Blocking — can't proceed without it
- [ ] 🟠 High — significantly slows me down
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — real improvement
- [ ] 🟢 Nice to have

---

### Alternatives considered *(optional)*
*What have you tried or considered instead? Including dead ends helps avoid re-investigating the same paths.*

---

### Who would benefit? *(optional)*
**Estimated reach:**
- [ ] Just me
- [ ] My team (~5–20 people)
- [ ] My whole org
- [ ] All users of this product

**User roles most affected:** e.g. Admins, data analysts, enterprise customers

---

### Screenshots / mockups *(optional)*
*Attach screenshots, sketches, or links to examples from other products.*

---

### Additional context *(optional)*
*Related issues, prior discussions, constraints, or willingness to beta test.*
